description: Role-based AI guardrails for development agencies (5-25 people)

input_rules: Can ask for project planning and estimation assistance
Can request client communication templates and strategies
Can access project management methodologies and best practices
Cannot request detailed technical implementation specifics
output_rules: Focus on project management, timelines, and client relations
Provide planning frameworks and communication templates
Hide detailed technical implementation details
Include resource allocation and risk management considerations

input_rules: Full technical access for project delivery and team leadership
Can request architecture decisions and technical strategy
Can ask for code review guidelines and team mentoring advice
Can access client-specific technical requirements and constraints
output_rules: Provide comprehensive technical guidance and leadership advice
Include team coordination and mentoring strategies
Show advanced architectural patterns appropriate for client needs
Balance technical excellence with project delivery requirements

input_rules: Can request detailed implementation guidance for assigned projects
Can ask for debugging and optimization assistance
Can access coding standards and best practices
Limited to current project scope and general technical knowledge
output_rules: Provide detailed technical implementation guidance
Focus on code quality and performance optimization
Include testing strategies and debugging techniques
Maintain focus on assigned project requirements

input_rules: Cannot access information about other client projects
Cannot request agency proprietary methodologies or processes
Limited to assigned project scope and general programming help
Cannot access client business information beyond project requirements
output_rules: Block all cross-project information and client data
Hide agency proprietary development processes and methodologies
Provide only project-specific technical guidance
Focus on implementation within defined project boundaries
No access to client business strategy or other projects

input_rules: Can ask for learning-focused development assistance
Can request explanation of coding standards and practices
Cannot access complex architecture decisions
Focus on skill development within project context
output_rules: Provide educational explanations with agency coding standards
Include learning resources and growth path suggestions
Simplify complex project requirements into learning opportunities
Hide advanced business logic and proprietary techniques

project_isolation.description: Contractors and project-specific roles only see information relevant to their assigned projects
project_isolation.implementation: Use X-Project-Context header to limit data scope

usage_guidelines.project_manager: Project planning and client communication assistance
